name: Snoogoo Corp.
summary: Snoogoo Corp. develops a Website platform that allows individuals and groups to search, save, and share digital information online in the United States. The company taps organic content archived on Snoogoo, search engines, video, audio, and image resources, as well as social media and reference sources in a single intelligent interface. Its platform is used by people in various walks of life as a research tool for general information gathering and sharing; in education; for shopping; and as a social portal that focuses users' interests and facilitates to organize their digital life. The company was formerly known as Casey Container Corp. and changed its name to Snoogoo Corp. in February 2015. Snoogoo Corp. was founded in 2006 and is based in Paradise Valley, Arizona.
